name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: We have been fighting for updates for years. In 2014, I requested that the Acting Commissioner make 11 reforms to #SocialSecurity disability that they had agency authority to change and didn’t need congressional approval for. One of those was updating the grid.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: The grid hasn’t been updated since 1978. Because of that, the eligibility criteria doesn’t include modern day jobs that use 21st century technologies.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Under the current system, part of #SocialSecurity disability eligibility is defined by an employment grid, which is a list of every job in the marketplace. It is used with a decision-making tool that factors things like age, education, & work experience.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Big news for the future of @SocialSecurity disability program. The eligibility criteria hasn't been meaningfully updated since 1978, leaving many on disability even though there are opportunities for those who want to work.

tweet: If they can't be moved to @ICEgov facilities due to lack of funding or space, they have to do best with what they have, especially to care for children.  https://t.co/jRsghJkBXI

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: @CBP wasn't meant to house folks or process them into the US/return them to their home country if they don't have legal justification for being here.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Here's the problem with that: the need to process still exists. But if @ICEgov can’t do their job as intended, it falls to @CBP to do it. So rather than @CBP’s specific mission to be law enforcement on the border, they now are doing their job AND @ICEgov’s job of detention.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: But recently there has been an effort by Democrats to limit the amount of beds available.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: That bed is an important part of the conversation–@ICEgov receives funding for that mission by the bed. The amount of money is connected to the number of beds it has–and that’s how many people it can have in its facility at any given time.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: For others, law enforcement is waiting on their criminal history from their home country. @ICEgov facilities should be the primary place they received medical care, additional resources, and a bed to sleep in.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Under current law, when an adult or family unit is caught by @CBP, they should be processed in the facility and then transferred to @ICEgov while more information came in. If that individual makes an asylum claim, they do so w/ @CBP.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Unaccompanied minors are still coming across, but so are family units who stay together while they are processed. More space is needed for @CBP to conduct its mission.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: @CBP mission is to process people coming across the border through non-approved channels (i.e., without a passport, a visa, or a legal reason to be present).

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: But an important part of the story is that this was always supposed to be a short-term facility before unaccompanied minors could be put in the care of @HHSGov or returned to their home country.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: The facility is divided up using chain link fence–you can see what it looks like in the background here.  https://t.co/tGS6Mp4zc0

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: We have 12 appropriations bills that address spending, but we don’t have a bill that addresses saving. I propose we add a 13th bill to address ways to save – a deficit reduction bill. I proposed 2 amendments today that would do this.

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Let’s make the budget a law—right now it’s only a “guiding” document for Congress. Making it law gives an enforceable budget levels that can help prevent gov’t shutdown threats making the budget fight happen on the front end

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Congress should have certain penalties when it fails to complete its basic functions to pass a budget and the essential funding bills that follow

name: Sen. James Lankford
tweet: Let’s require Congress to do regular deficit reduction. We do approps every yr, but we do not address long-term debt and deficit issues. Debt ceiling doesn't work. We continue to raise it& we never reign in debt. Let’s replace it& make Congress consider deficit reduction pkges
